# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We maintain security fixes on the latest released version. Older versions may not receive patches.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

- Please open a private security advisory on GitHub.
- Do not open public issues for vulnerabilities.
- Include reproduction steps, affected versions, and any relevant logs.
- We will acknowledge your report within 3 business days.

## Coordinated Disclosure

- We aim to investigate and remediate within a reasonable timeframe depending on severity.
- Once a fix is available, we will publish a new release and credit reporters (if desired).
- Please test the fix and confirm resolution before public disclosure.

## Scope

This policy covers the code in this repository. Dependencies should be reported upstream when appropriate.

## PGP / Verification

If you require encrypted communication, please propose a method in your report. We currently do not publish a PGP key.
